data.task_instructions: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one gene-expression observation candidate: zebrafish flcn expression during embryonic development, preferably brain, retina, hatching gland, or fin-bud context if supported. Preserve anatomy/stage/taxon hints and one record_evidence verified quote. Use the explicit zebrafish organism context as the ZFIN data-provider selector, but do not resolve anatomy, stage, gene, or provider database IDs in the extractor.

evidence_preview.subsection: Morpholino knockdown indicates embryonic functions of folliculin
evidence_preview.verified_quote: f Prim-10 stage embryo showing low level expression in the whole embryo with more pronounced expression in the forebrain and hindbrain areas, hatching gland (HG, arrow) and the fin bud (FB, arrow).

evidence_records.subsection: Morpholino knockdown indicates embryonic functions of folliculin
evidence_records.verified_quote: f Prim-10 stage embryo showing low level expression in the whole embryo with more pronounced expression in the forebrain and hindbrain areas, hatching gland (HG, arrow) and the fin bud (FB, arrow).

run_finished.response:
The extraction from the document identified a gene-expression observation for zebrafish flcn during embryonic development. The expression was noted in the forebrain, hindbrain, hatching gland, and fin bud at the Prim-10 stage. Here is a verified quote from the document:

"Prim-10 stage embryo showing low level expression in the whole embryo with more pronounced expression in the forebrain and hindbrain areas, hatching gland (HG, arrow) and the fin bud (FB, arrow)."

This observation is associated with the Zebrafish Information Network (ZFIN) as the data provider.

evidence_records.subsection: Morpholino knockdown indicates embryonic functions of folliculin
evidence_records.verified_quote: f Prim-10 stage embryo showing low level expression in the whole embryo with more pronounced expression in the forebrain and hindbrain areas, hatching gland (HG, arrow) and the fin bud (FB, arrow).

Gene Expression Extractor: AGR Species Context Lookup complete

toolArgs.claimed_quote: At Prim-5 stage there is increased expression in the myotome border/somatic furrow, eye, hatching gland (Fig. 1f arrow HG), fin bud (Fig. 1f arrow FB) tectum (Fig. 1g arrow T) and telencephalon (Fig.1g arrow TC). At long-pec stage pronounced expression is detected in a thin layer of cells in the posterior tectum (Fig. 1h arrow, i and j) and the fin (Fig. 1h).

args.query: zebrafish flcn expression embryonic development brain retina hatching gland fin-bud

args.claimed_quote: At Prim-5 stage there is increased expression in the myotome border/somatic furrow, eye, hatching gland (Fig. 1f arrow HG), fin bud (Fig. 1f arrow FB) tectum (Fig. 1g arrow T) and telencephalon (Fig.1g arrow TC). At long-pec stage pronounced expression is detected in a thin layer of cells in the posterior tectum (Fig. 1h arrow, i and j) and the fin (Fig. 1h).

At Prim-5 stage there is increased expression in the myotome border/somatic furrow, eye, hatching gland, fin bud, tectum and telencephalon. At long-pec stage pronounced expression is detected in a thin layer of cells in the posterior tectum and the fin.
At Prim-5 stage there is increased expression in the myotome border/somatic furrow, eye, hatching gland, fin bud, tectum and telencephalon.

At Prim-5 stage there is increased expression in the myotome border/somatic furrow, eye, hatching gland (Fig. 1f arrow HG), fin bud (Fig. 1f arrow FB) tectum (Fig. 1g arrow T) and telencephalon (Fig.1g arrow TC).
f Prim-10 stage embryo showing low level expression in the whole embryo with more pronounced expression in the forebrain and hindbrain areas, hatching gland (HG, arrow) and the fin bud (FB, arrow).

flow_summary.run_finished_preview:
The extraction from the document identified a gene-expression observation for zebrafish flcn during embryonic development. The expression was noted in the forebrain, hindbrain, hatching gland, and fin bud at the Prim-10 stage. Here is a verified quote from the document:

"Prim-10 stage embryo showing low level expression in the whole embryo with more pronounced expression in the forebrain and hindbrain areas, hatching gland (HG, arrow) and the fin bud (FB, arrow)."

This observation is associated with the Zebrafish Information Network (ZFIN) as the data provider.

trial.prompt: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one gene-expression observation candidate: zebrafish flcn expression during embryonic development, preferably brain, retina, hatching gland, or fin-bud context if supported. Preserve anatomy/stage/taxon hints and one record_evidence verified quote. Use the explicit zebrafish organism context as the ZFIN data-provider selector, but do not resolve anatomy, stage, gene, or provider database IDs in the extractor.
trial.title: Expression and knockdown of zebrafish folliculin suggests requirement for embryonic brain morphogenesis
